description.p: A polished take on the classic Bricktron brick-breaker. Bounce the ball off your paddle to smash a grid of destructible tiles, catch falling power-ups, and climb the high-score table.

ul.li: 10x5 tile grid with a multi-hit HP system and beveled rendering
Five power-ups: wider paddle, slow ball, extra life, multiball, and fireball
Particle explosions, a ball motion trail, and screen shake
Retro sound effects and an animated CRT-styled intro screen
Hand-designed levels loaded from files, with randomized fallback grids

screenshot.caption: Gameplay with the destructible tile grid

description.p: Adds a self-playing attract/demo mode (starts after inactivity on the intro or with --demo) that also catches falling power-ups, and a stretch-to-fill fullscreen mode.
First packaged release: five power-ups, sound effects, file-based levels, and FHS-compliant installation.
